SHERIFFS DISPATCH FROM GRAHAM COUNTY REPORTED THAT ASH CREEK WAS FLOWING RAPIDLY WHICH RESULTED IN THE CLOSURE OF CLUFF RANCH RD. IN ADDITION THE HEAVY RAIN RESULTED IN SOME HOMES BEING IMPACTED NEAR THE TOWN OF PIMA. MEASURED RAINFALL FROM THE CLUFF RANCH ALERT GAUGE SHOWED 2.6 INCHES IN 6 HOURS AND 3.15 INCHES IN 24 HOURS.
